articles.title: Nova Folding Scheme Achieves New Performance Benchmarks for Settlement
articles.description: Microsoft Research announces improvements to Nova folding-based ZKP system, reducing prover time by 3x for institutional settlement workloads.

articles.title: DTCC Uses Zero-Knowledge Proofs for Privacy-Preserving Clearing
articles.description: DTCC completes Phase 2 of digital securities pilot with ZKP-based verification of tokenized Treasury securities.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs Explores ZK-Rollups for Cross-Border FX Settlement
articles.description: Investment bank tests zero-knowledge rollup technology to compress and verify foreign exchange trades.

articles.title: EU Digital Identity Wallet to Use ZKP for Age Verification
articles.description: European Commission adopts zero-knowledge proofs for privacy-preserving credential verification.

articles.title: NHS Pilots ZKP-Based Patient Consent Verification
articles.description: UK health service tests zero-knowledge proofs for cross-hospital data sharing without revealing records.

articles.title: Stanford Research: ZKPs Enable Private Supply Chain Audits
articles.description: New paper shows how ZKPs allow suppliers to prove ESG compliance without revealing proprietary processes.

articles.title: JPMorgan Expands Tokenized Deposit Network to 5 Countries
articles.description: Major expansion of Onyx platform for cross-border wholesale payments using tokenized deposits.

articles.title: EU MiCA Implementation Drives Stablecoin Compliance Wave
articles.description: Financial institutions accelerate compliance programs as MiCA enforcement begins across EU.

articles.title: BlackRock Tokenized Fund Surpasses 2B in Assets
articles.description: BUIDL fund on Ethereum becomes largest tokenized money market fund attracting institutional allocators.

articles.title: Maersk Scales Blockchain Supply Chain Tracking to 12 Ports
articles.description: Shipping giant expands DLT tracking for real-time cargo provenance and customs clearance.

articles.title: Energy Web Foundation Launches Carbon Credit Registry on Chain
articles.description: Blockchain-based registry enables transparent carbon credit issuance and retirement for utilities.

articles.title: Succinct Labs Raises 55M Series B for ZK Prover Network
articles.description: SP1 prover network startup secures funding to expand enterprise proof marketplace.

articles.title: Fireblocks Launches Institutional DeFi Access Layer
articles.description: Custody platform enables banks to access DeFi through permissioned compliance wrappers.

articles.title: Azure Expands Confidential Computing for Digital Asset Workloads
articles.description: Microsoft expands SGX/SNP enclave availability to 12 new regions for blockchain and ZKP workloads.

articles.title: AWS Adds Managed Blockchain Node Support for 3 New Chains
articles.description: Amazon expands managed node infrastructure for Ethereum, Polygon, and Avalanche.
